display.name: Yin - Temporal singularities
display.author: Yin
display.blurb: Temporal singularities warp spacetime in slow cosmic majesty.

annotation.technical_notes: A highly unstable feedback loop in sampler_main quickly saturates into a blown-out white field, driven by high gain and additive blending triggered by bass beats. The right margin displays a vertical band of digital glitch patterns, where custom waves and horizontal line slices react to the music's mid and treble frequencies. Per-pixel warp equations create a lateral shearing motion, pushing the feedback buffer leftward into an over-brightened, high-contrast void.
